sections.content: The purple square should be at the gray diamond now. Let me check the current state and see if the gray diamond broke again. If so, I need to figure out the goal. Maybe I need to click the gray diamond pieces or the hollow purple diamond.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("All non-background nodes:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] != 'B' and node['color'] != 'g':
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if node['pixels'] >= 3:
            print(f"  color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, center~({(min(rows)+max(rows))//2},{(min(cols)+max(cols))//2})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
